title: Customizable Totem
description: By adding your own skin to the pack, the totem of undying will update to look like ClownPierce's or Theobald's totem but with your skin!
body:
## Showcase
<iframe
  width="560"
  height="315"
  src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/b1G7ePwF-0w?start=36s"
  title="YouTube video player"
  frameborder="0"
  allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share"

</iframe>

![popped](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/A52SN7tt/images/d696cd694b39721d521d9b6b356d008b71f0c3ad.png)

For more images and demonstrations, head to [the gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/totem/gallery)

## Description
This texture pack has a custom model for the totem of undying that makes it so that if you change the texture of the totem to a Minecraft skin, it will make the totem look like a mini version of the skin! You can replace the texture with any Minecraft skin at all, and it will map different pixels to the final totem texture.

All you need to do is download your skin from a website like namemc.com, then replace the file at `assets/minecraft/textures/totem_skin.png` in the texture pack with the file you downloaded. Make sure you rename the file to `totem_skin` or it won't work!

## How to Use

If you are having any trouble, there is a helpful tutorial on youtube: https://youtu.be/b1G7ePwF-0w?t=36s

1. Install the texture pack and put it in your resourcepacks folder
2. Download your skin from a website like namemc.com
3. Rename the skin png to `totem_skin`
4. Open the resource pack and go to `assets/minecraft/textures`
5. Replace the file in there with the one you downloaded
6. Make sure to press `F3+T` ingame just to make sure it works

## Support
If you want to suggest anything, report a bug, or vote on future packs, then [join my discord](https://discord.gg/gymTft2GbV) and you can message me in there. I will usually respond very quickly.

https://www.alphaleo.li/resourcepacks
